company.title: Company profile
company.description: Information shown on receipts, invoices and reports
company.name: Company name

pos.title: POS terminal
pos.holdOrderDesc: Allow cashiers to park orders and resume later
pos.mixedPaymentDesc: Allow multiple payment methods on one order
pos.requireCustomerCreditDesc: Credit sales must have a selected customer
pos.lowStockDesc: Show a warning when product stock is low

loyalty.cardDesc: Customers with master pricing earn bonus points per payment. Points use actually paid amounts only (excludes unpaid credit).
loyalty.masterEnableDesc: When enabled, customers with pricing tier master earn points automatically.
loyalty.pointsHint: e.g. 1000 means 1 point per 1000 UZS paid (integer part).
loyalty.generalEnableDesc: Registered non-master customers can also earn per your scope rules.
loyalty.redeemEnableDesc: Apply discount from selected customer balance.
loyalty.advancedDesc: Expiry, tiers, campaigns — loyalty.advanced.* exists in DB; logic comes in a later version.

tax.title: Tax
tax.inclusiveDesc: Tax is included in product prices
tax.perProductDesc: Allow different tax rates per product

receipt.title: Receipt & printing
receipt.middlePh: e.g. bank details, return policy, promo
receipt.middleHint: Printed after the product list and before totals and payments.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.batchDesc: Batch tracking for COGS and reporting. When enabled, sales require batch allocation.
inventory.batchEnableConfirm: Enable batch mode? Mandatory from next day 00:00 after cutover; opening batches will be created for current stock.
inventory.batchDisableConfirm: Disable batch mode? (Data is kept; enforcement only stops.)
inventory.batchAlertText: After cutover, insufficient batch quantity blocks a sale. Fix stock via adjustments only.
inventory.negHintBlock: Cannot sell when stock is zero
inventory.batchCostNote: Average cost is not used in batch mode; FIFO applies.

numbering.title: Numbering & IDs
numbering.description: Prefixes and formats for document numbers

security.title: Users & security
security.multiSessionDesc: Users can sign in from multiple devices

offline.title: Local data
offline.description: Main data is stored in SQLite on desktop. Here you can clear browser-layer storage only.
offline.autonomousP1a: POS, products and orders are stored in your
offline.autonomousP2: For multiple tills on one database, use the HOST/CLIENT tab.
offline.clearDesc: Clears localStorage and sessionStorage (e.g. legacy keys). Does not affect SQLite.
offline.noteDesc: For full database reset, open the System Reset tab as admin.
offline.clearConfirm: Browser storage will be cleared. Continue?
offline.toastClearedDesc: Browser storage cleared. Reload if needed.

network.title: POS network (HOST / CLIENT)
network.description: One database (HOST) and multiple tills (CLIENT). Restart the app on this device to apply changes.
network.configMissingDesc: window.posApi.appConfig not found. Check Electron preload/IPC.
network.modeHint: HOST opens pos.db. CLIENT has no local DB — all queries go to HOST.
network.hostPortHint: Allow this port in the firewall on the HOST machine.
network.hostSecretHint: CLIENTs use this secret to reach HOST (you may change it).
network.clientUrlHint: Used in CLIENT mode. Static HOST IP recommended.

reset.cardDesc: Admin only. Actions are irreversible and affect the local SQLite database.
reset.dangerDesc: Data may be permanently deleted. Ensure you have backups.
reset.browserDesc: Clears localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, caches and React Query. Does not clear SQLite. App will reload.
reset.browserConfirm: Clear browser data? The app will reload.
reset.sqliteDesc: Permanently deletes business data from the local SQLite database. Desktop only. Type DELETE to confirm.

dialogs.unsavedDesc: You have unsaved changes in this section. They will be lost if you leave. Discard and go to the selected tab?
dialogs.resetIntro: The following will be permanently deleted:

toast.netSavedDesc: Network settings saved. Restart the app to apply.

errors.dbResetDesktopOnly: Database reset is only available in the desktop app.
